# insert(_:)

**Instance Method**

Inserts the given `text` or one of it‚Äôs alternative texts available on `alternatives`

## Declaration

```swift
func insert(_ alternatives: BETextAlternatives)
```

## Text alternatives

- **alternativesForSelectedText()**: Returns the text alternatives that are available to the text input object.
- **add(_:)**: Adds text alternatives to the text input object for the current selection
